nodes.label: Share Insight Image
nodes.summary: Default share card image used when sharing an insight/洞见 to WeChat friends or moments.

nodes.label: Zaichang Blue Badge
nodes.summary: Blue variant of the '在场' (present/attendance) badge icon used to indicate active attendance status.

nodes.label: Share Default Image
nodes.summary: Generic fallback share card image used when no specific share image is available.

nodes.label: Zaichang Grey Badge
nodes.summary: Grey/inactive variant of the '在场' (present/attendance) badge icon used to indicate inactive or unavailable attendance status.

nodes.label: Heart Image (JPG)
nodes.summary: Heart/like icon in JPG format used for expressing appreciation or liking content in the mini-program.

nodes.label: Heart Image (PNG)
nodes.summary: Heart/like icon in PNG format (with transparency) used for expressing appreciation or liking content in the mini-program.

nodes.label: Mini Program QR Code
nodes.summary: WeChat mini-program QR code image used for sharing or promoting the morning reading camp mini-program.

nodes.label: Home Tab Icon (Active, PNG)

nodes.label: User Tab Icon (SVG)
